description: Defense.com provides a cyber security platform centered on XDR, SIEM, vulnerability scanning, managed detection and response, and related compliance and awareness products. Its site also advertises integrations and an AI-powered cyber security MCP for centralizing security data and detecting threats.
summary: Defense.com publicly advertises an AI-powered cyber security MCP, but its developer-facing connection endpoint, transport, and authentication details are not documented on the public site; no public HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI integration surface was found.
